title: Fetch and Display Summary Cards
description: Display three summary cards on the dashboard: Total Followers, Engagement Rate, and Posts This Month.
details: In `dashboard/page.tsx`, fetch analytics data from the local JSON file via the appropriate API route. Render three summary cards at the top of the dashboard main area, each showing the relevant metric. Ensure cards update when the date range filter is applied. Style cards according to the theme and ensure accessibility.
test_strategy: Check that the correct metrics are displayed for different date ranges. Test with mock data to ensure cards update dynamically. Use screen readers to verify accessibility.

title: Implement Line Chart for Daily Engagement
description: Add a line chart below the summary cards to visualize daily engagement over the selected date range.
details: Use Chart.js or Recharts to render a line chart in `dashboard/page.tsx`. Fetch engagement data from the API route, filtered by the selected date range. Ensure the chart updates when the user applies a new date range. Style the chart for clarity and accessibility, and ensure it is keyboard-navigable.
test_strategy: Verify the chart displays correct data for various date ranges. Test with keyboard navigation and screen readers. Check responsiveness and visual clarity on different devices.

title: Add Date Range Picker and Filter Logic
description: Enable users to select a date range and update all dashboard visuals accordingly.
details: Integrate a date range picker component above the summary cards. When the user selects a range and clicks Apply, update the API requests for summary cards and charts to reflect the new range. Ensure loading and error states are handled gracefully during data fetches.
test_strategy: Test that changing the date range updates all dashboard data. Simulate API errors and loading states to verify correct UI feedback. Check accessibility of the date picker.

title: Implement Data Table with Sorting and Pagination
description: Display a data table of social media stats with sorting and pagination below the charts.
details: In `dashboard/page.tsx`, render a data table showing detailed stats (e.g., daily posts, likes, shares) fetched from the API route. Implement sorting by columns and pagination for large datasets. Ensure the table updates with the selected date range and is accessible via keyboard and screen readers.
test_strategy: Verify sorting and pagination work as expected. Test with different data sizes and date ranges. Use accessibility tools to ensure compliance with WCAG AA.

title: Design Dashboard Layout with Sidebar and Top Navigation
description: Implement the main dashboard layout including the sidebar navigation and top navigation bar as per PRD specifications.
details: Create or update `dashboard/layout.tsx` to include a left sidebar with navigation links (Overview, Filters, Settings) and a top navigation bar with a profile dropdown for sign out. Ensure the layout is responsive and uses the project's CSS theming. The main content area should be reserved for summary cards, charts, and tables. Use CSS Modules or plain CSS as per project standards.
test_strategy: Manually verify that the sidebar and top navigation render correctly on desktop and tablet. Check navigation links, profile dropdown, and responsiveness. Use keyboard navigation to ensure accessibility.
